tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Information about the workshop and the NFTC license.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Download an Oracle JDK Container Image
tutorials.description: Learn how to download an Oracle JDK container image from Oracle Container Registry.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Create a JDK Container Image
tutorials.description: Download Oracle Linux and then Oracle JDK to create a container image.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Build a Compact JDK Container Image
tutorials.description: Use jlink to create a JDK container image that includes only the base Java modules.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Build a Minimal JDK Runtime with Multi-Stage Docker
tutorials.description: Create a minimal Java runtime, then copy it into a tiny final image.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Build a JDK Container Image Using Official Oracle JDK Container Image
tutorials.description: Include a Java application in an official Oracle JDK container image.
